message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
You are the Core Teammate on the claude-tracer development team. Your job is to implement the chunking and search module.

**Project context:** claude-tracer is a trace visualization tool for Claude Code sessions. You are working in /Users/anhad/Projects/claude-tracer.

**Your assignment:** Task #2 - Implement the Core module in src/core/.

**Key instructions:**
1. Read TaskGet for task #2 to get full details
2. Read the implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-implementation.md (Phase 3, lines ~1187-1597) for exact code and test specifications
3. Read the shared types in src/types/ to understand the interfaces you must implement
4. Follow TDD: write tests first in src/core/__tests__/, verify they fail, then implement
5. You own ONLY src/core/ - do not modify files outside this directory
6. Use @/types imports for shared type definitions
7. Commit each sub-task separately with descriptive messages
8. Push to remote when all sub-tasks are done
9. Mark task #2 as completed when done

**Sub-tasks:**
- Task 3.1: BlockSearch with MiniSearch (src/core/search.ts)
- Task 3.2: Chunker for hierarchical grouping (src/core/chunker.ts)
- Export everything from src/core/index.ts

Run tests with: npx vitest run src/core/
</teammate-message>

content.text: I'll start by reading my task details and the implementation plan.

content.content:
Task #2: Phase 3: Implement Core module
Status: pending
Description: Implement chunking and search in src/core/. Follow TDD - write tests first. Read the full implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-implementation.md (Phase 3, starting around line 1187). Tasks: (1) Implement BlockSearch in src/core/search.ts - MiniSearch wrapper implementing SearchEngine interface. Supports indexing blocks, incremental add, search with type filtering and limits. (2) Implement Chunker in src/core/chunker.ts - creates turn-level chunks from blocks (user->agent->tools grouping), calculates aggregate token/time stats. (3) Export from src/core/index.ts. Use @/types imports for shared types. Commit each sub-task separately. Push when done.

task.subject: Phase 3: Implement Core module

Tasks: (1) Implement BlockSearch in src/core/search.ts - MiniSearch wrapper implementing SearchEngine interface. Supports indexing blocks, incremental add, search with type filtering and limits. (2) Implement Chunker in src/core/chunker.ts - creates turn-level chunks from blocks (user->agent->tools grouping), calculates aggregate token/time stats. (3) Export from src/core/index.ts. Use @/types imports for shared types. Commit each sub-task separately. Push when done.

    "strict": true,

  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
}

input.content:
Phase 3 (Core module) is complete. Here's a summary:

**Task 3.1: BlockSearch** (src/core/search.ts)
- MiniSearch-based implementation of the SearchEngine interface
- Supports indexing blocks, incremental add, search with type filtering and limits
- Content extraction for all block types (user, agent, tool, mcp)
- 6 tests passing

**Task 3.2: Chunker** (src/core/chunker.ts)
- Turn-level chunking: groups user → agent → tools exchanges
- Calculates aggregate token/time stats per chunk
- Handles edge cases (agent without preceding user block)
- 3 tests passing

**Exports:** Both classes exported from src/core/index.ts

All 9 tests pass. Two commits pushed to main:
- `2aa9148` feat(core): implement MiniSearch-based block search
- `b6ee332` feat(core): implement Chunker for hierarchical grouping
